titleStmt.title: SII 10.367: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 367. (A.R. No. 181 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURANTAKAM, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1181. (61st year of Gaṇapatidēva) (Siddhārthi)

summary.p: States that Nātavāḍi Kumāra Gaṇapatidēva-Mahārāja gave 50 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
rājyamūla staṁbhāyamāna śiṣṭēṣṭanidhāna bhūlōkaciṁtāmaṇi
samadhai¨ryya jagadudāra paranārīdūra karakalitakarāḷakaravāḷa
¨rdhipā¨rddhivasvayāvaraṇasatvarasurasuṁdarībṛṁdaparīkṣyamāṇaraṇadhara
pama mahābhāga danujavidāraṇavijṛṁbhamāṇakapaṭakaṁṭhīrava bhairavabhērī
ṁkāracitārātiharavanitānayanayugaḷavigaḷadanūnabāṣpadu¨rdinasatata
himāyamāna ṁtarūpasaubhāgya dvitīyaratikānta vijayayātrāsannaddha si
ṁdhudēśīyaturagakharakhurakhanitakṣititalarajaścakrākrāṁtamā[¨rtta]ṁḍa vitaraṇavini¨rjitanu
rataruṣaṁḍa tribhuvanādhīśvara śrītripurāṁtakadēva divyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka parabalasādhakanā
mādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara nātavāḍi kumāragaṇapatidēvamahā
rājulu svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvarakākatīyagaṇapatidēvamahārājula divyarājyasaṁvatsa
ramulu 61 srāhi śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1181 Agu nēṁṭi siddhā¨rddhisaṁvatsara kā¨rtika śu 15 śu nāṁṭi sōma
grahaṇanimittamuna śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmahādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpāna kiccina mōdālu 50 Ēṁbhayi
vīniṁ jēkoni Abhinavagaṇapāvuramu pōtanabōyunikoḍuku dēvanabōyuṁ
ḍu nityamāneṁḍu neyi tanaputrānupautramu Ācaṁdrārkamu naḍapaṁgalavāṁ
ḍu . Akhaṁḍadīpānaku Iccina dīpakaṁbamu 1
Digital edition of SII 10.367 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
